overall.description: A first-person walk along the Los Santos River in GTA V during golden hour, transitioning from a residential sidewalk through an intersection to a curved riverside path with views of the concrete channel, highway bridges, and downtown skyline. The footage features warm sunset lighting and light vehicular traffic.

events.description: approaching and entering the street intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the intersection, passing palm trees and street lamps

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
low metal railing separating sidewalk from grassy embankment
weathered concrete pavement with visible cracks and stains
tall street lamp posts with curved arms
downtown Los Santos skyline visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a residential sidewalk during golden hour, with palm trees and metal railings lining the left side. The camera walks steadily forward toward an intersection, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance through the warm atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight riverside path with power transmission towers

events.description: crossing the intersection and entering the riverside walkway
large semi-truck with trailer passes by on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along the straight riverside path beside a large power transmission tower

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with white trailer driving past on the right side

entered.detail: large steel lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines
steep concrete walls of the Los Santos River channel

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the path opens into a wider riverside walkway dominated by a massive power transmission tower on the left. The concrete river channel becomes visible in the distance. A large semi-truck passes by on the right as the camera continues walking straight toward the downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved riverside overlook with highway bridges

events.description: path curves left following the river bend, revealing the channel and bridges

agents.ego_description: following the curved path as it bends left around the river channel, providing panoramic views of the waterway and overpasses

entered.detail: multiple concrete highway bridges spanning across the river channel

segments.scene_description: The path gradually curves left, following the bend of the river channel. The power transmission tower recedes into the distance as the camera moves past it. The concrete river channel becomes the dominant feature on the left, with multiple highway overpasses visible spanning across it. The downtown skyline remains prominent ahead as the sun sets directly in front.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a quiet residential sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, industrial riverside vista. It begins along a path lined with palm trees and metal railings, moving steadily toward an intersection with the downtown skyline shimmering through a warm atmospheric haze. As the camera crosses the intersection, the environment expands into a riverside walkway dominated by a massive power transmission tower and the first glimpse of a concrete river channel, while a large semi-truck passes by on the right. The scene then shifts as the path curves left, leaving the tower behind and bringing the concrete channel and spanning highway overpasses into full view. Finally, the camera continues its approach toward the prominent downtown skyline as the sun sets directly ahead.
